38.reason: [The partition function has an off-by-one error: the loop condition should be `j <= high` or the pivot selection and swapping logic must match standard Lomuto/Hoare schemes. As written, it accesses `arr[high]` which may be out of the intended range when called with `quickSort(terms, 0, numTerms - 1)` because the loop runs `j < high`, but then swaps with `arr[high]`. This leads to incorrect sorting or undefined behavior.]

118.reason: [This loop does not stop after the second line ends with newline. It will keep trying to read until EOF or invalid input, which may cause issues if input only has two lines. The first polynomial reading uses a getchar() check to break on newline, but the second doesn't 鈥 leading to potential infinite loop or incorrect parsing if extra whitespace exists.]
